concepts.name: SZ Fusion
concepts.description: Bold S and Z strokes with feminine side profile in negative space between letters. Soft glow and verification check.
strengths: Silhouette most visible at large sizes

concepts.name: Shield Trust
concepts.description: Shield frame with SZ monogram and centered profile negative space. Verification badge at base.
weaknesses: Slightly more complex than pure monogram

concepts.name: Luxe Monogram
concepts.description: Interlocked minimal S/Z with thinnest profile curve. Editorial luxury aesthetic.

productionRecommendation.name: Shield Trust
productionRecommendation.rationale: Best balance of trust, legibility at favicon sizes, premium aesthetic, and subtle non-explicit feminine silhouette for an adult classifieds marketplace.
